sections.paragraph:
- Original: θεράπων

- Transliteration: therapon

- Phonetic: ther-ap'-ohn

- Definition:

1. an attendant, servant: of God

a. spoken of Moses discharging the duties committed to him by God

- Origin: apparently a participle from an otherwise obsolete derivative of the base of G2330

- TDNT entry: 05:12,3

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Apparently a participle from an otherwise obsolete derivation of the base of G2330; a menial attendant (as if cherishing): - servant.
